basic_details.job_title: District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Junior Typist, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Gr-III and Salaried Amin
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Gr-III, and Salaried Amin posts! Published on the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 20 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 18 to 42 years age group and possessing +3 examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application, H.S.C. examination or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training, and requisite computer & typewriting/shorthand skills can apply offline from the release date to 27 June 2026. Find all details about the Distri

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed as per Rule-5 of the Odisha District and Civil Courts' Judicial Staff Services (Method of Recruitment and Conditions of Service) Rules, 2008 and amendments for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application, H.S.C. examination or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training, Knowledge in Computer Application, Minimum speed of 40 wpm in typewriting on computer, Minimum speed of 80 wpm in shorthand and 40 wpm in typewriting on computer, Ability to speak, read and write Odia (M.E. Standard)
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute. Junior Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute. Minimum speed of 40 wpm in typewriting on computer. Stenographer Gr-III: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute. Minimum speed of 80 wpm in shorthand and 40 wpm in typewriting on computer. Salaried Amin: H.S.C. examination or equivalent from a recognized Board and Revenue Inspector Training from Govt./Recognized institution and knowledge in Computer Application. All Posts: Ability to speak, read and write Odia (M.E. Standard).

selection_process: Written Examination (Part-I) Shorthand and Type Writing Test Type Writing Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Survey Practical Test Viva Voce Test
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dhenkanal.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 is 27th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for various posts including Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Gr-III, and Salaried Amin in the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist?
faq.answer: For the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post, candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University and possess a Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination, Shorthand and Type Writing Test, Type Writing Test, Computer Science Test (Practical), Survey Practical Test, and Viva Voce Test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Level-4 Rs.19,900-63,200/-, Level-7 Rs.25,500- 81,100/-, to Level-5 Rs.21,700-69,100/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for District Judge Dhenkanal?
faq.answer: The official website for District Judge Dhenkanal is https://dhenkanal.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for the official notification and application form.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date is 15 May 2026, and the last date for the receipt of applications is 27 June 2026. The age will be calculated as on 01 May 2026.

faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Judge Dhenkanal Recruitment 2026 is 27th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.
